bad-handwriting.jpg.description: A piece of paper with almost-unreadable handwriting scribbled on it

dot-plot-pounds-training.png.description: A dot plot showing the distribution of pounds across a training dataset of animals. Each dot is an emoij of the species for each animal (cats, dogs, lizards, snails, and tarantulas)

dot-plot-pounds-testing.png.description: A dot plot showing the distribution of pounds across a testing dataset of animals. Each dot is an emoij of the species for each animal (cats, dogs, lizards, snails, tarantulas, and rabbits)

empty-tree.png.description: An empty decision tree representing a search for a species of animal.
empty-tree.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Draw.io

swims-confusion.png.description: A screenshot of a Pyret confusion matrix for the swims-classifier's success at making predictions about the training dataset
swims-confusion.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Pyret

tree-3.png.description: A portion of a decision tree representing a search for a student in class. This one has multiple branches and levels, and leaf nodes for 'Jimmy' and 'Susan'
tree-3.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Draw.io

tail-classifier-tree.png.description: An decision tree representing a search for a species of animal. The root node splits based on who has a tail. The 'no' branch has 2 tarantulas and 2 snails, while the 'yes' branch has 2 lizards, 4 dogs, and 5 cats
tail-classifier-tree.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Draw.io
